title: Fast reaction test scores
description: Append-only leaderboard for the Fast reaction game. Source of truth: data/source/fast-scores.json (git-encrypted vault).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the score was achieved

playerName.description: Defaults to "Anonymous" upstream, but always present by the time it reaches this schema.

playerId.description: Defaults to "unknown" upstream, but always present by the time it reaches this schema.
